---
title: "mlr3"
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
```
## TASKS

### 导入数据 
```{r}
data("mtcars", package = "datasets")
mtcars %>% head() %>% knitr::kable()
```

### 建立TASK
```{r}
library("mlr3")

task_mtcars = as_task_regr(mtcars, target = "mpg", id = "cars")
print(task_mtcars)
```
